cases.name: global module table can be returned
native module require binding can be returned
function member parameters and module return are declared
for variables and upvalue are declared
cases.source:
local total = 0
for index = 1, 3 do
  total = total + index
end
local function read()
  return total
end
return read()

cases.name: local global function expression generic for and upvalue are declared
cases.source:
global_total = 0
local values = { one = 1 }
local add = function(delta)
  for key, value in pairs(values) do
    global_total = global_total + value + delta
  end
  return global_total
end
return add(2)

cases.name: table field assignment does not declare global
index assignment does not declare global
method name is not a global but method parameter is declared
duplicate switch case value is diagnosed
cases.source:
switch value do
case 1, 2
  print('x')
case 2
  print('y')
end
